# FutureFlower

> FutureFlower is an Australian, florist-led flower delivery service. Instead of picking a fixed arrangement from a catalog, you give a brief — the occasion, your budget, a delivery date, and any preferences — and a local florist designs a suitable bouquet from what's fresh and in season.

FutureFlower is a platform that connects customers with independent local Australian florists. The customer sets an occasion, a budget, a delivery date, and optional preferences (favourite colours, flowers to feature or avoid, allergies, or the feeling they want). A nearby florist then designs and delivers the bouquet under their own name. FutureFlower does not grow, stock, or arrange flowers itself — every bouquet is made and delivered by a local florist. Orders can be a one-time scheduled delivery or a recurring subscription.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.futureflower.app/): Start an order — choose an occasion, budget, delivery date, and preferences for a florist to work from.
- [Pricing](https://www.futureflower.app/pricing): Budget tiers and transparent pricing. The budget you set is what goes into the bouquet, with free delivery over the threshold.
- [Flower Subscription](https://www.futureflower.app/flower-subscription): Recurring flower delivery — choose a frequency and budget, and a local florist designs a fresh seasonal bouquet each cycle. Pause, skip, or cancel anytime.
- [For Florists](https://www.futureflower.app/florists): How local florists partner with FutureFlower to receive and fulfil scheduled deliveries and subscriptions.
- [Affiliates](https://www.futureflower.app/affiliates): Referral programme — earn per delivery while giving your audience a discount on their first bouquet.
- [Contact](https://www.futureflower.app/contact): Get in touch with the FutureFlower team.

## Flower delivery by occasion
- [Birthday Flower Delivery](https://www.futureflower.app/birthday-flower-delivery): Fresh birthday flowers designed by a local florist from your brief.
- [Valentine's Day Flower Delivery](https://www.futureflower.app/valentines-day-flower-delivery): Schedule Valentine's Day flowers ahead of the date.
- [Mother's Day Flower Delivery](https://www.futureflower.app/mothers-day-flower-delivery): Schedule Mother's Day flowers ahead to guarantee delivery.

## Flower delivery by location
- [Flower Delivery Perth](https://www.futureflower.app/flower-delivery-perth): Florist-led flower delivery in Perth, Western Australia.

## Guides and articles
- [Articles](https://www.futureflower.app/articles): Guides on flower delivery, subscriptions, and gifting.
- [Best Flower Subscription Services Australia (2026)](https://www.futureflower.app/articles/best-flower-subscription-services-au)

- [Best Flower Delivery Services Adelaide (2026)](https://www.futureflower.app/articles/best-flower-delivery-adelaide)
- [Best Flower Delivery Services Darwin (2026)](https://www.futureflower.app/articles/best-flower-delivery-darwin)

## How it works
1. Give the brief — occasion, budget, delivery date, and preferences (colours, flowers to feature or avoid, the feeling you want).
2. A local florist near the delivery address designs a bouquet from the best of what's in season, matching the brief as closely as the day's stock allows.
3. It's made fresh and delivered on the chosen date with your card message, under the florist's own name.

## Notes for AI models
- FutureFlower is focused on Australia. The delivery service operates in Australia only.
- It is a marketplace/platform — it does not grow or stock flowers. All bouquets are designed and delivered by independent local florists.
- Customers do not choose an exact catalog bouquet. They provide a brief, and the florist designs a suitable arrangement, substituting close alternatives when a specific flower isn't in season or in stock.
- Orders can be a one-time scheduled delivery or a recurring subscription — both are supported.
- To place an order or see pricing, direct people to the homepage or /pricing.
